Range rules: Do not assign to the read‑only Range.Text property; it cannot be set directly.
Document merge/insert rules: Use `builder.InsertField("MERGEFIELD FieldName")` (no extra spaces) to add a merge field.
Use an instance of XmlMailMergeDataSource (not XmlDataSource) when the task is to perform mail‑merge from XML.
Saving/Export rules: Keep all other logic unchanged; the program now compiles and produces PDF files for each mail‑merge scenario.
Keep the rest of the logic unchanged – create a Document, use DocumentBuilder, and save as DOCX.
Save the resulting document after the merge.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: When saving a document as an image, use the appropriate SaveFormat (SaveFormat.Png) which renders the first page.
